html:
Exclusive to:
This content is available only after activating Lunar Rift and defeating Celestial Scion

“Now you're the catcher!
Find the energy running loose in the storms and try to restrain it.”

-

The Static Restrainer is a tool used to catch Unrestrained Static in the Moonstorm. Once caught, it turns into an Energetic Static that starts the Moonstorm Quest. Its recipe is unlocked after players defeat the Celestial Scion for the first time.

Gallery

  • Static Restrainer Equipped

–Wilson

–Willow

–Wolfgang

–WX-78

–Wickerbottom

–Woodie

–Maxwell

–Warly

–Wormwood
“Ain't nothin' in there.”
–Winona
“It's hollow, you follow?”
–Wortox
“Put thing inside?”
–Wurt
“Looks empty, Wobes.”
–Walter
“I thought I caught one...”
–Wanda
“Now you're the catcher!
Find the energy running loose in the storms and try to restrain it.”

The Static Restrainer is a tool used to catch Unrestrained Static in the Moonstorm. Once caught, it turns into an Energetic Static that starts the Moonstorm Quest. Its recipe is unlocked after players defeat the Celestial Scion for the first time.
